sent_simp: 她参加了全国烹饪大赛。
sent_trad: 她參加了全國烹飪大賽。
pinyin: Tā cānjiā le quánguó pēngrèn dàsài.
english: She entered the national cooking contest.

sent_simp: 大选结果明天会公布。
sent_trad: 大選結果明天會公布。
pinyin: Dàxuǎn jiéguǒ míngtiān huì gōngbù.
english: The general election results will be announced tomorrow.

sent_simp: 暴雨导致大面积停电。
sent_trad: 暴雨導致大面積停電。
pinyin: Bàoyǔ dǎozhì dà miànjī tíngdiàn.
english: The heavy rain caused widespread power outages.

sent_simp: 他真是个好人，总是帮助别人。
sent_trad: 他真是個好人，總是幫助別人。
pinyin: Tā zhēn shì gè hǎorén, zǒng shì bāngzhù biérén.
english: He is truly a good person who always helps others.

sent_simp: 如果说工作很忙，那也得注意休息。
sent_trad: 如果說工作很忙，那也得注意休息。
pinyin: Rúguǒ shuō gōngzuò hěn máng, nà yě děi zhùyì xiūxi.
english: If work is really busy, you still need to make sure you rest.

sent_simp: 这份方案还没有经过审定。
sent_trad: 這份方案還沒有經過審定。
pinyin: Zhè fèn fāng'àn hái méiyǒu jīngguò shěndìng.
english: This plan has not yet been reviewed and approved.

sent_simp: 牛奶富含钙质，适合每天喝。
sent_trad: 牛奶富含鈣質，適合每天喝。
pinyin: Niúnǎi fùhán gàizhì, shìhé měitiān hē.
english: Milk is rich in calcium and good to drink every day.

sent_simp: 大家都希望国家越来越富强。
sent_trad: 大家都希望國家越來越富強。
pinyin: Dàjiā dōu xīwàng guójiā yuè lái yuè fùqiáng.
english: Everyone hopes the country becomes more and more prosperous and strong.

sent_simp: 请大家按号码就座。
sent_trad: 請大家按號碼就座。
pinyin: Qǐng dàjiā àn hàomǎ jiùzuò.
english: Please take your seats according to your number.

sent_simp: 这所学校的师资力量很强。
sent_trad: 這所學校的師資力量很強。
pinyin: Zhè suǒ xuéxiào de shīzī lìliàng hěn qiáng.
english: This school has a very strong teaching staff.

sent_simp: 老师带队去博物馆参观。
sent_trad: 老師帶隊去博物館參觀。
pinyin: Lǎoshī dàiduì qù bówùguǎn cānguān.
english: The teacher led the group to visit the museum.

sent_simp: 过年时家家户户贴年画。
sent_trad: 過年時家家戶戶貼年畫。
pinyin: Guònián shí jiājiā hùhù tiē niánhuà.
english: Every household puts up New Year pictures during the Spring Festival.

sent_simp: 工厂搬到了郊外的开发区。
sent_trad: 工廠搬到了郊外的開發區。
pinyin: Gōngchǎng bān dào le jiāowài de kāifāqū.
english: The factory moved to a development zone in the suburbs.

sent_simp: 我们应该弘扬传统文化。
sent_trad: 我們應該弘揚傳統文化。
pinyin: Wǒmen yīnggāi hóngyáng chuántǒng wénhuà.
english: We should promote and carry forward traditional culture.

sent_simp: 他出差一周后终于归来了。
sent_trad: 他出差一周後終於歸來了。
pinyin: Tā chūchāi yī zhōu hòu zhōngyú guīlái le.
english: He finally returned after a week away on a business trip.

sent_simp: 团队正在攻关这个技术难题。
sent_trad: 團隊正在攻關這個技術難題。
pinyin: Tuánduì zhèngzài gōngguān zhège jìshù nántí.
english: The team is working hard to tackle this technical challenge.

sent_simp: 洪水过后，志愿者赶来救灾。
sent_trad: 洪水過後，志願者趕來救災。
pinyin: Hóngshuǐ guòhòu, zhìyuànzhě gǎnlái jiùzāi.
english: After the flood, volunteers rushed in to provide disaster relief.

sent_simp: 他平时很忙，周末更是抽不出时间。
sent_trad: 他平時很忙，週末更是抽不出時間。
pinyin: Tā píngshí hěn máng, zhōumò gèng shì chōu bu chū shíjiān.
english: He is usually very busy, and on weekends he has even less time to spare.

sent_simp: 多喝水有利于身体健康。
sent_trad: 多喝水有利於身體健康。
pinyin: Duō hē shuǐ yǒulìyú shēntǐ jiànkāng.
english: Drinking plenty of water is beneficial to your health.

sent_simp: 有关部门已对此事进行查处。
sent_trad: 有關部門已對此事進行查處。
pinyin: Yǒuguān bùmén yǐ duì cǐ shì jìnxíng cháchǔ.
english: The relevant department has already investigated and handled this matter.

sent_simp: 检察机关对此案展开了调查。
sent_trad: 檢察機關對此案展開了調查。
pinyin: Jiǎnchá jīguān duì cǐ àn zhǎnkāi le diàochá.
english: The procuratorate launched an investigation into this case.

sent_simp: 此事已经解决，请放心。
sent_trad: 此事已經解決，請放心。
pinyin: Cǐ shì yǐjīng jiějué, qǐng fàngxīn.
english: This matter has already been resolved, so please don't worry.

sent_simp: 水果有很多种，比如说苹果和香蕉。
sent_trad: 水果有很多種，比如說蘋果和香蕉。
pinyin: Shuǐguǒ yǒu hěn duō zhǒng, bǐrú shuō píngguǒ hé xiāngjiāo.
english: There are many kinds of fruit, for example apples and bananas.

sent_simp: 这是一所民办学校，收费较高。
sent_trad: 這是一所民辦學校，收費較高。
pinyin: Zhè shì yī suǒ mínbàn xuéxiào, shōufèi jiào gāo.
english: This is a privately run school, so the fees are relatively high.

sent_simp: 很多民工春节前会赶回老家。
sent_trad: 很多民工春節前會趕回老家。
pinyin: Hěn duō míngōng Chūnjié qián huì gǎn huí lǎojiā.
english: Many migrant workers rush back to their hometowns before the Spring Festival.

sent_simp: 活期存款随时可以取出来。
sent_trad: 活期存款隨時可以取出來。
pinyin: Huóqī cúnkuǎn suíshí kěyǐ qǔ chūlái.
english: Money in a current account can be withdrawn at any time.

sent_simp: 这条河的流向是从北到南。
sent_trad: 這條河的流向是從北到南。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo hé de liúxiàng shì cóng běi dào nán.
english: This river flows from north to south.

sent_simp: 厨房的燃气灶用起来很方便。
sent_trad: 廚房的燃氣灶用起來很方便。
pinyin: Chúfáng de ránqì zào yòng qǐlái hěn fāngbiàn.
english: The gas stove in the kitchen is very convenient to use.

sent_simp: 昨晚发生了一起特大交通事故。
sent_trad: 昨晚發生了一起特大交通事故。
pinyin: Zuó wǎn fāshēng le yī qǐ tèdà jiāotōng shìgù.
english: An exceptionally serious traffic accident occurred last night.

sent_simp: 她学会了理财，每月都有存款。
sent_trad: 她學會了理財，每月都有存款。
pinyin: Tā xuéhuì le lǐcái, měi yuè dōu yǒu cúnkuǎn.
english: She learned to manage her finances and saves money every month.

sent_simp: 这个城市正在申办国际马拉松赛。
sent_trad: 這個城市正在申辦國際馬拉松賽。
pinyin: Zhège chéngshì zhèngzài shēnbàn guójì mǎlāsōng sài.
english: This city is bidding to host an international marathon.

sent_simp: 他每天骑电动车上班。
sent_trad: 他每天騎電動車上班。
pinyin: Tā měitiān qí diàndòngchē shàngbān.
english: He rides his electric scooter to work every day.

sent_simp: 电讯行业发展越来越快。
sent_trad: 電訊行業發展越來越快。
pinyin: Diànxùn hángyè fāzhǎn yuè lái yuè kuài.
english: The telecommunications industry is developing faster and faster.

sent_simp: 今年销售额增长了五个百分点。
sent_trad: 今年銷售額增長了五個百分點。
pinyin: Jīnnián xiāoshòu'é zēngzhǎng le wǔ gè bǎifēndiǎn.
english: This year's sales grew by five percentage points.

sent_simp: 相对而言，坐地铁更省时间。
sent_trad: 相對而言，坐地鐵更省時間。
pinyin: Xiāngduì ér yán, zuò dìtiě gèng shěng shíjiān.
english: Relatively speaking, taking the subway saves more time.

sent_simp: 看得出他今天心情不太好。
sent_trad: 看得出他今天心情不太好。
pinyin: Kàn de chū tā jīntiān xīnqíng bù tài hǎo.
english: You can tell that he is not in a great mood today.

sent_simp: 护士们每天都在医疗第一线工作。
sent_trad: 護士們每天都在醫療第一線工作。
pinyin: Hùshimen měitiān dōu zài yīliáo dìyīxiàn gōngzuò.
english: Nurses work on the front line of healthcare every day.

sent_simp: 这个小区每月收取一定的管理费。
sent_trad: 這個小區每月收取一定的管理費。
pinyin: Zhège xiǎoqū měi yuè shōuqǔ yīdìng de guǎnlǐfèi.
english: This residential community charges a fixed management fee every month.

sent_simp: 端午节我们一起包粽子吧。
sent_trad: 端午節我們一起包粽子吧。
pinyin: Duānwǔ jié wǒmen yīqǐ bāo zòngzi ba.
english: Let's make zongzi together for the Dragon Boat Festival.

sent_simp: 闪电过后，紧接着响起了雷声。
sent_trad: 閃電過後，緊接著響起了雷聲。
pinyin: Shǎndiàn guòhòu, jǐn jiēzhe xiǎngqǐ le léishēng.
english: Right after the lightning, thunder immediately followed.
